definition: reverse area fraction: area with u_n<0 divided by total plane area
required_basis: same-window plane area; normal velocity field; unit normal; plane role; time window
train_split_requirement: calibrate only on training/support cases with same plane definitions and source-status labels
heldout_requirement: confirm on held-out cases without changing threshold after inspection
false_negative_model_error_rule: false negatives are ordinary-model rows whose residuals or reverse metrics exceed the calibrated tolerance; record as model-form error, not coefficient miss
current_evidence_status: current lower-right corner RAF about 0.763; upcomer proxy RAF varies by plane; no TAMU epsilon selected
provisional_action: use as diagnostic/blocking field until threshold is calibrated

definition: reverse mass fraction: reverse absolute mass flux divided by total absolute mass flux
required_basis: signed mdot; absolute mdot; reverse massflow; density/velocity basis; plane role; time window
train_split_requirement: calibrate on training/support cases with exact flux definitions, not area proxies
heldout_requirement: held-out rows must report both signed net mdot and F_m under the locked epsilon
false_negative_model_error_rule: false negatives are one-stream rows that pass net mdot but fail reverse mass or residual checks
current_evidence_status: current lower-right corner RMF about 0.5; upcomer rows are proxy/parse-incomplete or missing
provisional_action: block ordinary K/F6/Nu use when material reverse mass is present

definition: secondary-flow strength relative to normal kinetic or velocity scale
required_basis: transverse velocity components; normal velocity basis; averaging basis; branch orientation
train_split_requirement: calibrate with same vector decomposition and plane normal for all training rows
heldout_requirement: held-out rows must preserve decomposition and report residual impact
false_negative_model_error_rule: false negatives are rows where small reverse fractions still leave secondary-flow-driven pressure or heat residuals
current_evidence_status: current two-tap rows carry scalar SVF only; upcomer rows lack components
provisional_action: require vector-component harvest before numeric threshold selection

definition: wall-core or cross-section thermal stratification measure that invalidates one bulk state
required_basis: enthalpy-weighted bulk T; wall/core T; wall heat flux; plane/patch alignment; same time window
train_split_requirement: calibrate on training/support thermal rows after heat-loss residual ownership is separated
heldout_requirement: held-out rows must preserve no-runtime-leakage and source/property labels
false_negative_model_error_rule: false negatives are one-bulk-state rows that pass flow gates but miss wall/probe thermal shape beyond model-error tolerance
current_evidence_status: current package records wall-core Delta T fields as missing for recirculation harvest; Phase 4 must reopen this
provisional_action: hold as unresolved thermal switching field

definition: downstream velocity-profile recovery error relative to the source/reference profile
required_basis: downstream recovery length in D; plane sweep; velocity profile; qref basis; source/reference profile
train_split_requirement: calibrate only after geometry and recovery plane sweep are available for training rows
heldout_requirement: held-out rows must use the locked recovery-length rule and same qref convention
false_negative_model_error_rule: false negatives are component rows accepted before recovery but later showing profile unrecovered or residual-shifted behavior
current_evidence_status: current corner/reducer rows lack recovery-plane sweep and source-matched geometry
provisional_action: block component K; allow section/cluster diagnostic labels only

definition: pressure-gradient recovery error or unresolved pressure residual after hydrostatic, kinetic, and straight/developing corrections
required_basis: static/reduced-static pressure planes; hydrostatic correction; kinetic correction; straight/developing reference; plane sweep
train_split_requirement: calibrate on exact same pressure basis and same-QOI uncertainty family
heldout_requirement: held-out rows must not tune recovery after seeing residual sign or magnitude
false_negative_model_error_rule: false negatives are rows classified as component loss although recovery/straight reference explains the residual
unresolved_epsilon_field: epsilon_pressure_gradient_recovery_error,current lower-right rows have negative available residual and missing same-basis straight/developing reference"
current_evidence_status: preserve pressure-recovery diagnostic and section-effective labels

definition: coherent recirculation volume plus exchange flux and residence time required for MF-04 exchange-cell state
required_basis: cell volume; exchange mass flux; recirculation temperature; residence time; pressure residual; energy residual
train_split_requirement: calibrate only after CFD cell evidence exists across training/support rows
heldout_requirement: held-out rows must score energy and pressure residual ownership without changing exchange constants
false_negative_model_error_rule: false negatives are persistent-exchange regions left as one-stream branches that fail both pressure and heat residual tests
current_evidence_status: current evidence has diagnostics and proxy rows but lacks coherent volume/residence fields
provisional_action: define next evidence needs; do not fit exchange coefficient
